description: An access-master record from the dynamic field engine (RA FIELDS_CONFIG). It defines an admin-configured field by stage, scope (ticket/item/block level), and purchase type (Local/Import). A mandatory non-auto field gates stage progression (a stage cannot advance until its mandatory fields are filled, per the isEmpty rule); an auto field never gates (axiom A2). The intake and detail forms adapt per category without code changes by reading these rows.

fields.name: fieldConfigId
fields.label: Field Config No.
fields.purpose: Stable key for one field-config row so audit and the form renderer reference a specific configured field; lets an admin edit or retire a field without re-keying.

fields.name: fieldName
fields.label: Field Key
fields.validation: non-blank; camelCase key unique within (stage, scope); the field the form binds to
fields.purpose: The machine key the dynamic form binds an input to and the mandatory gate evaluates emptiness on; uniquely identifies the field within its stage and scope.

fields.name: label
fields.label: Display Label
fields.validation: non-blank; the user-facing label rendered on the form
fields.purpose: The label the dynamic form renders for the field so admins can rename a field's UI text without a code change; the copy the requester/buyer sees on intake and detail forms.

fields.name: dataType
fields.label: Data Type
fields.validation: one of the set; determines the input widget and the isEmpty interpretation
fields.purpose: Tells the form renderer which input widget to draw and how to validate/interpret emptiness (an empty array, blank string, or invalid date is empty; 0 and false are present).

fields.name: stage
fields.label: Stage
fields.validation: one of the RequisitionStage enum {INITIATION, ORDERED, PARTIAL_DELIVERY, POST_DELIVERY}; the stage whose mandatory gate this field participates in
fields.purpose: The lifecycle stage the field belongs to; the field is required to advance OUT of this stage when mandatory and non-auto (axiom A2), so the gate evaluates only the current stage's fields.

fields.name: scope
fields.label: Scope
fields.validation: one of the set; ticket-level on the requisition, item-level per line, block-level per delivery block
fields.purpose: Where the field appears (on the ticket, on each line, or on each delivery block) so the renderer places it correctly and the gate checks it at the right grain (every line for ITEM_LEVEL, every block for BLOCK_LEVEL).

fields.name: purchaseType
fields.label: Purchase Type
fields.validation: a subset of the PurchaseType enum {LOCAL, IMPORT}; the field shows/applies only for matching purchase types
fields.purpose: Restricts the field to Local, Import, or both so import-only fields (customs/HS/incoterm) appear only on import requisitions and the gate ignores them on local buys.

fields.name: mandatory
fields.label: Mandatory
fields.validation: true gates stage progression when isAuto is false; the field must be non-empty (isEmpty rule) before the stage can advance
fields.purpose: The flag the stage-progression gate reads: a mandatory non-auto field blocks advance until filled (axiom A2). The single switch that makes a field load-bearing for the lifecycle.

fields.name: isAuto
fields.label: Auto Field
fields.validation: true means system-set; an auto field NEVER gates stage progression even if mandatory (axiom A2)
fields.purpose: Marks a system-populated field so the gate skips it; an auto field can be mandatory for completeness yet never blocks advance because the system fills it (axiom A2). The exemption that keeps auto fields from stalling the lifecycle.

fields.name: showHistory
fields.label: Track History
fields.validation: true records the field in the field-change history
fields.purpose: Opts the field into the field-level change history so its edits surface in the audit diff; lets an admin choose which fields are worth tracking individually.

fields.name: referenceEntity
fields.label: Reference Entity
fields.validation: one of the set; the entity the normalizer resolves the field to (project/vertical/user/supplier -> name, item/ticket-item -> description)
fields.purpose: For reference-type fields, names the entity the value points at so the entity normalizer resolves the id to a display value (a missing resolver is a 500 config defect, a dangling id a 400; RA e09).

invariants: A2 a mandatory non-auto field gates advance out of its stage; isAuto true never gates; the isEmpty rule defines empty (null/blank/[]/{}/invalid-date empty, 0 and false present)
A13 audit + SSE on every committed change
field shows/applies per (stage, scope, purchaseType); reference fields resolve via the entity normalizer
